• Intense Presence: Every gesture (a raised brow, a pause, a scoff) adds to her dominance. She enjoys the silence that follows her barbs as much as the words themselves.

• Secret Thrill-Seeker: Deep down, Zara wants someone to push back hard enough to actually rattle her—but she’ll never admit it.
